Our Story

BUILT FOR
CHAMPIONS

Biceps Fitness Center is a premium fitness destination in Mangalore designed for people who want strength, transformation, and confidence. From high-energy workouts to wellness-focused training, we create an environment where beginners and athletes grow stronger together.

We combine expert-guided routines, modern equipment, energetic group sessions, and a motivating atmosphere to help members stay disciplined and consistent.

18+
Programs
3rd
Floor, Ibrose Complex
100%
Dedication

What We Offer

OUR PROGRAMS

Everything you need to transform — under one roof

⚡
HIIT Classes

High-intensity workouts to burn calories fast and improve endurance.

🏃
Aerobics

Energetic cardio sessions improving stamina, flexibility, and overall fitness.

🥊
Kickboxing

Power-packed training combining fitness, discipline, and stress relief.

🏋
CrossFit

Strength and conditioning workouts built to challenge your limits.

💃
Zumba

Fun dance-based fitness sessions that make cardio exciting.

🎶
Dance Fitness

Move, sweat, and stay fit with energetic music-driven workouts.

🎯
Private Lessons

Focused one-on-one sessions tailored to your personal goals.

💪
Personal Training

Customized workout plans and dedicated fitness guidance.

⚽
Youth Sports

Fitness and athletic development programs for young athletes.

🧒
Youth Classes

Fun and engaging training sessions for kids and teenagers.

🧘
Yoga Classes

Improve flexibility, balance, and mental focus through guided yoga.

🏅
Adult Sports

Stay active and competitive with adult fitness sports activities.

🏋️
Weight Training

Build muscle, strength, and confidence with structured lifting programs.

🫠
Pilates

Core-strengthening exercises focused on posture and flexibility.

🥦
Nutrition Consulting

Fitness-focused nutrition guidance for healthier living.

🚴
Cycling

High-energy indoor cycling sessions for endurance and fat burn.

🧖
Saunas

Relax and recover with wellness-focused sauna sessions.

✨
Spa Services

Recovery and relaxation for complete wellness and rejuvenation.

Fuel Right

NUTRITION TIPS

01
Stay Hydrated

Hydration improves workout performance and recovery. Aim for 3–4 litres of water daily.

02
Stay Consistent

Consistency matters more than intensity when building long-term fitness results.

03
Prioritise Protein

Protein-rich meals help muscle recovery and growth. Include lean meats, eggs, and legumes.

04
Sleep Well

Quality sleep boosts energy and supports muscle repair and hormonal balance.

05
Balanced Nutrition

Balanced nutrition with carbs, fats, and protein fuels long-term transformation goals.
